articles.title: 伊朗战事最新快讯：美国搜救失踪船员 特朗普再发威胁
articles.title_original: Iran War Live Updates: U.S. Races to Rescue Missing Crew Member as Trump Repeats Threats
articles.summary: 当前伊朗局势持续紧张，美国正紧急展开行动搜救一名失踪船员。特朗普称其要求开放霍尔木兹海峡的最后通牒时间"所剩无几"，以色列日前袭击了伊朗西南部一处大型石油化工综合体。
articles.summary_original: President Trump said time was “running out” on his ultimatum to reopen the Strait of Hormuz, and Israel struck a major petrochemical complex in Iran’s southwest.

articles.title: 高端智能投影品牌AWOL Vision获近亿元B轮融资，新品拿下近2000万美金众筹｜硬氪首发
articles.summary: 高端智能投影品牌AWOL Vision近日完成近亿元B轮融资，投资方包括天堂硅谷、会畅科技等多家机构，资金将用于技术研发、生态构建与全球化布局。该品牌新款激光投影海外众筹募得近2000万美元，累计众筹超2亿元，是中国首个完成“双千万美元级验证”的消费电子品牌。

articles.title: 柬埔寨揭幕雕像纪念著名探雷嗅探鼠
articles.title_original: Cambodia unveils statue to honour famous landmine-sniffing rat
articles.summary: 柬埔寨揭幕一座纪念雕像，用以纪念已故的非洲巨囊鼠。这只特殊的嗅探鼠专职从事排雷工作，一生中成功嗅探发现超过100枚地雷，为当地排除雷患、保障民众安全作出突出贡献，因此获立雕像纪念。
articles.summary_original: The statue honours the late African giant pouched rat who sniffed out more than 100 landmines during his lifetime.

articles.title: 慎终追远承先志 红色基因代代传 河北各地举行清明祭英烈活动 - hebcdi.gov.cn
articles.summary: 清明时节，河北、北京、四川等多地开展形式多样的清明祭英烈活动，各界通过擦拭墓碑、补刻英名、主题纪念等方式缅怀革命英烈，解放军报头版头条刊文，呼吁弘扬英雄精神，传承红色基因，凝聚奋进力量。

articles.title: 长征路上忆英烈 砥砺奋进写荣光 - 人民网
articles.summary: 人民网推出题为《长征路上忆英烈 砥砺奋进写荣光》的主题报道，围绕缅怀长征英烈、传承长征精神展开，号召大众铭记英烈事迹，从长征历史中汲取砥砺奋进的力量，完整报道内容目前可前往Google新闻查看。

articles.title: 保障清明假期市民出行 北京公交启动专项运输服务 - 人民网
articles.summary: 清明假期来临，多地交通部门优化出行服务保障市民出行：北京公交启动清明专项运输服务，保障祭扫等出行需求，扫墓接驳线已迎来客流高峰，高峰运力加密至每3分钟一班；绍兴地铁调整运营安排，济南公交开展了文明祭扫宣传活动。

articles.title: 假期首日北京市属公园迎客58.57万人次 - 央广网
articles.summary: 假期首日，北京春色浓郁繁花盛放，国家植物园等北京市属公园推出趣味游园、非遗体验、科普研学、踏青赏花等多元活动，可满足游客追思怀远、休闲出游等不同需求，当日北京市属公园累计接待游客达58.57万人次。

articles.title: 特朗普发布视频宣称“打死多名伊朗军事领导人” - chinanews.com.cn
articles.summary: 美国前总统特朗普发布视频，公开宣称己方已打死多名伊朗军事领导人。这一相关新闻由中国新闻网发布，想要了解完整内容的受众，可以前往Google新闻平台查阅该事件的完整报道。

articles.title: 纽约一男子被控枪杀推车内婴儿致死
articles.title_original: Man charged over fatal shooting of baby in pram in New York
articles.summary: 美国纽约威廉斯堡发生一起恶性枪击案，一名仅七个月大的婴儿在推车内遭枪击不幸身亡。目前当地警方已抓获两名涉案男子，其中一名男子已被正式指控该项杀人罪名，案件相关处理工作正在进行中。
articles.summary_original: Two men have been arrested over the shooting of a seven-month-old baby in Williamsburg.

articles.title: 伊朗外长：若发生核泄漏，周边国家将遭殃 - 凤凰网
articles.summary: 美以4日对伊朗发动空袭，击中伊朗南部、西南部多处设施，包括钢铁厂、石化经济特区相关目标。伊朗外长警告称，若袭击引发核泄漏，周边国家都将遭殃；伊朗同时称已做好伏击敌方第五代战斗机与先进无人机的准备，美方情报认为霍尔木兹海峡短期内不太可能“打通”。

articles.title: 科威特石油总部遭伊朗无人机袭击起火
articles.title_original: Kuwaiti Oil Headquarters Set Ablaze by Iranian Drone Strike
articles.summary: 伊朗近日对其波斯湾邻国发动最新袭击行动，科威特石油公司总部在此次袭击中遭遇无人机攻击，随后引发火灾。这是伊朗近期针对波斯湾周边邻国发起的最新攻击，袭击目标为科威特核心能源机构。
articles.summary_original: Kuwait Petroleum Corp.’s headquarters caught fire after a strike by unmanned drones in the latest Iranian attack on its Persian Gulf neighbors.

articles.title: 清明假期首日全国预计近3亿人次出行 - 南方日报
articles.summary: 清明假期迎来客流高峰，假期首日全国预计有近3亿人次出行，其中全社会跨区域人员流动量预计超2.9亿人次。4月3日当日，全社会跨区域人员流动量已达20826.9万人次，交通部门已增加运力应对此次出行高峰。

articles.title: 搜寻失踪美军空军人员之际 美伊互相威胁将引发‘浩劫’
articles.title_original: US and Iran trade threats to unleash 'hell' as search for missing US airman continues
articles.summary: 霍尔木兹海峡关闭导致国际油价大幅飙升，美国前总统特朗普向伊朗发出要求重新开放该海峡的最后通牒，这一要求已遭到伊朗拒绝。目前美方仍在搜寻一名失踪的美军空军人员，美伊双方正互相放出威胁言论。
articles.summary_original: Iran rejected Donald Trump's ultimatum for a deal to re-open the Strait of Hormuz whose closure has led to a spike in oil prices.

articles.title: 曾为印度最伟大舞台皇后之一的男子
articles.title_original: The man who became one of India's greatest stage queens
articles.summary: 孟加拉男性艺人查帕尔·巴杜里早年以反串女角登上舞台，曾是孟加拉知名度最高的舞台“皇后”，在印度戏剧领域留下独特印记。随着女性演员正式登上戏剧舞台，大众的关注才逐渐从他身上转移开来。
articles.summary_original: Chapal Bhaduri was Bengal’s biggest stage queen - until women arrived and the spotlight moved on.

articles.title: 特朗普欲达成遣返协议 威权统治者有意接洽
articles.title_original: Trump Wants to Make Deportation Deals. Autocrats Are Ready to Listen.
articles.summary: 特朗普政府计划推动与其他国家达成移民遣返相关协议，不少国家的威权统治者已对此释放出愿意洽谈的信号。美国白宫现已将原本作为标志性国内议题的遣返事务，打造为美国一项重要对外政策，外界已梳理出该项目的已知信息。
articles.summary_original: The White House has turned deportations, a signature domestic issue, into a major piece of foreign policy. Here’s what we know about the program.

articles.title: 致命地震与洪灾加剧阿富汗困境
articles.title_original: Deadly Earthquake and Floods Worsen Afghanistan’s Troubles
articles.summary: 阿富汗近期接连遭遇灾害，本周洪灾已造成至少77人死亡，数千栋房屋被毁或受损，周五又发生地震造成十余人死亡，多重致命灾害叠加进一步恶化了阿富汗本就艰难的处境。
articles.summary_original: Floods have killed at least 77 people this week and destroyed or damaged thousands of homes, and an earthquake on Friday killed a dozen more.

articles.title: 彼得·泰尔大手笔押注太阳能奶牛项圈
articles.title_original: Peter Thiel’s big bet on solar-powered cow collars
articles.summary: 知名投资人彼得·泰尔旗下风投机构创始人基金，向主打太阳能奶牛项圈的畜牧管理初创企业Halter投资2.2亿美元。这款项圈用于牧场牛群管理，这笔针对畜牧科技领域的大手笔投资，引发业界对其投资逻辑的关注。
articles.summary_original: Why did Founders Fund invest $220 million in cattle management startup Halter?

articles.title: 美国称逮捕已故伊朗将军苏莱曼尼的亲属
articles.title_original: US says it has arrested relatives of late Iranian ​general Qasem ​Soleimani
articles.summary: 美国官员对外公布，已故伊朗将军卡西姆·苏莱曼尼的一名侄女和一名侄孙女，目前正处于美国移民与海关执法局的羁押管控之中，相关消息已经得到美方官方确认。
articles.summary_original: The niece and grand-niece of Qasem Soleimani are in the custody of US Immigration and Customs Enforcement, officials said.

articles.title: 45岁以下德国男性长期海外停留或需军方批准
articles.title_original: German males under 45 may need military approval for long stays abroad
articles.summary: 德国出台新规，要求45岁以下德国男性长期在海外停留，需提前获得军方的出行批准。新规明确这类出行申请通常都会予以核准，但目前该项规则若被违反，具体将如何落实执行尚不明确。
articles.summary_original: Under the law, travel approvals must generally be granted and it remains unclear how the rule would be enforced if breached.

articles.title: 身陷困境的初创公司Delve与Y Combinator分道扬镳
articles.title_original: Embattled startup Delve has ‘parted ways’ with Y Combinator
articles.summary: 合规初创公司Delve因身陷争议处境艰难，围绕这家公司的争议已经让它付出了代价，这家初创公司现已与全球知名创业加速器Y Combinator结束合作关系，双方正式分道扬镳。
articles.summary_original: The controversy around Delve appears to have cost the compliance startup its relationship with accelerator Y Combinator.

articles.title: 搜寻失踪空军人员对美国构成严峻考验
articles.title_original: Search for missing airman presents serious test for US
articles.summary: 一架美军F-15战机被击落，机上一名武器系统军官目前失踪，搜寻该失踪人员的行动对美国构成了严峻考验。倘若这名军官最终被伊朗俘获，相关局势的风险还将进一步升高。
articles.summary_original: The stakes could rise further if the weapons system officer of the downed F15 Eagle plane is captured by Iran.

articles.title: 伊朗战争后首轮通胀数据料显示美国通胀将飙升
articles.title_original: US Inflation Seen Spiking in First Snapshot Since Iran War
articles.summary: 美国消费者近期已明显感受到国内汽油价格突发上涨，这一变化将在本周即将公布的美国关键通胀数据中得到完整呈现。这是伊朗战争后美国发布的首轮通胀数据，市场普遍预计美国通胀将大幅飙升。
articles.summary_original: The sudden increase in US gasoline prices felt by American consumers is set to be on full display in key inflation data due out this coming week.

articles.title: 俄罗斯袭击乌克兰市场致五人死亡
articles.title_original: Russian attack on Ukraine market kills five
articles.summary: 周六上午，一架俄罗斯无人机袭击了乌克兰南部一座城镇的繁忙市场。本次袭击造成5人死亡，另有21人受伤，事发地点为该城镇人员活动密集的区域，事件发生在俄乌冲突持续的背景下。
articles.summary_original: A Russian drone hit a busy spot in the southern Ukrainian town on Saturday morning, injuring another 21 people.

articles.title: 斯莱彭称欧洲央行下次讨论选项为加息或维持利率：播客
articles.title_original: Sleijpen Says ECB Discussion Will Be Rate Hike or Hold: Podcast
articles.summary: 欧洲央行管理委员会成员奥拉夫·斯莱彭在播客节目中表示，欧洲央行下一次货币政策讨论将围绕两个选项展开，要么上调利率，要么维持当前利率水平稳定，不会考虑其他方向的调整。
articles.summary_original: The European Central Bank’s next discussion will between increasing interest rates or holding them steady, according to Governing Council member Olaf Sleijpen.

articles.title: 一名民谣音乐家成为AI造假与版权流氓目标
articles.title_original: A folk musician became a target for AI fakes and a copyright troll
articles.summary: 今年1月，民谣艺术家墨菲·坎贝尔发现流媒体平台Spotify的个人主页中，多出数首非本人上传的歌曲。这些歌曲她曾录制但从未上传该平台，且人声存在异常，她推断是他人抓取她发在YouTube的演出内容后制作的AI伪造作品。
articles.summary_original: In January, folk artist Murphy Campbell discovered several songs on her Spotify profile that did not belong there. They were songs that she had recorded, but she'd never uploaded them to Spotify, and something was off about the vocals. She quickly surmised that someone had pulled performances of the songs she posted to YouTube, created […]

articles.title: 一名民谣音乐家遭AI伪造侵权 成版权流氓目标
articles.title_original: A folk musician became a target for AI fakes and a copyright troll
articles.summary: 一月份，民谣艺术家墨菲·坎贝尔发现自己在流媒体平台Spotify的个人主页中，多出数首她从未上传的歌曲。这些歌曲对应她曾录制的作品，但人声存在异常，她推断是他人盗用她发布在YouTube的演出内容，通过AI伪造生成后上传。
articles.summary_original: In January, folk artist Murphy Campbell discovered several songs on her Spotify profile that did not belong there. They were songs that she had recorded, but she'd never uploaded them to Spotify, and something was off about the vocals. She quickly surmised that someone had pulled performances of the songs she posted to YouTube, created […]

articles.title: “正确政绩观”的历史唯物主义阐释 - 光明网
articles.summary: 多家媒体围绕正确政绩观推出相关内容：光明网刊发《“正确政绩观”的历史唯物主义阐释》，凤凰网报道树立和践行正确政绩观学习教育中央第一指导组进驻江西见面会召开，人民日报刊文呼吁干部守本分怀“痴情”，中国青年网漫谈政绩观，提出政绩好不好由百姓说了算。

articles.title: 巴基斯坦称将向阿联酋偿还到期贷款存款
articles.title_original: Pakistan Says It Will Repay Matured Loan Deposits to UAE
articles.summary: 巴基斯坦宣布将向阿拉伯联合酋长国偿还到期的贷款存款，这一偿债操作将对这个南亚国家的国家储备造成压力。巴基斯坦本就面临储备紧张的状况，此次偿债将进一步消耗其储备规模，加剧该国整体储备承压的态势。
articles.summary_original: Pakistan will return matured loan deposits to the United Arab Emirates, in a move that will strain the South Asian nation’s reserves.

articles.title: 三人因纵火袭击英国犹太慈善机构救护车被起诉
articles.title_original: Three Charged With Arson in Attack on U.K. Jewish Charity’s Ambulances
articles.summary: 英国发生一起针对本国犹太慈善机构救护车的纵火袭击事件，目前已有三人被指控纵火。警方通报，第四名嫌疑人在涉案被告的听证会露面后被逮捕，这起三月发生的袭击遭到广泛谴责，尚未被定性为恐怖事件。
articles.summary_original: A fourth suspect was arrested after showing up at a hearing for the defendants, the police said. The March attack was widely condemned but has not been declared a terrorist incident.

articles.title: 《彭博周末节目 2026年4月4日》
articles.title_original: Bloomberg This Weekend 04/04/2026
articles.summary: 这是彭博推出的周末新闻直播节目，于2026年4月4日从纽约播出，由三名主持人坐镇，为周末重大新闻头条提供清晰解读、背景梳理，内容兼具趣味性，本次节目邀请了政治、商业、文化等领域多名资深嘉宾参与。
articles.summary_original: The news doesn’t stop when markets close. Hosts David Gura, Christina Ruffini and Lisa Mateo bring clarity, context and a bit of humor to the weekend’s biggest headlines, LIVE from New York. Joined by Axios Senior Politics Reporter Marc Caputo, Former Assistant Secretary of State for Political-Military Affairs Under George Bush Brigadier General Mark Kimmitt, Napster Corp. CEO John Acunto, Pulsar Helium President Cliff Cain, “The Infinity Machine” Author Sebastian Mallaby, Democratic National Co

articles.title: 斯蒂芬·刘易斯：一位身负使命的不凡之士
articles.title_original: Stephen Lewis Was a Singular Man on a Mission
articles.summary: 加拿大艾滋病活动家、政客斯蒂芬·刘易斯已于本周二辞世。生前非洲大陆不断上演的艾滋病致死悲惨场景深深触动了他，也成为他持续投身艾滋病防治事业的核心动力，他一生为相关事业奔走，倾尽心力推动非洲艾滋病救助工作。
articles.summary_original: Heartbreaking scenes of death from H.I.V. in Africa enraged and fueled the work of the Canadian AIDS activist and politician who died on Tuesday.

articles.title: Anthropic称Claude Code订阅者使用OpenClaw需额外付费
articles.title_original: Anthropic says Claude Code subscribers will need to pay extra for OpenClaw usage
articles.summary: 人工智能企业Anthropic宣布，Claude Code订阅用户搭配OpenClaw及其他第三方工具，使用该平台的编码助手服务时需要额外付费，此前的订阅费用并不覆盖这类使用场景，相关用户的使用成本将有所上升。
articles.summary_original: It’s about to become more expensive for Claude Code subscribers to use Anthropic’s coding assistant with OpenClaw and other third-party tools.

articles.title: Anthropic称Claude Code订阅用户使用OpenClaw需额外付费
articles.title_original: Anthropic says Claude Code subscribers will need to pay extra for OpenClaw usage
articles.summary: 人工智能企业Anthropic宣布，Claude Code订阅用户在搭配OpenClaw以及其他第三方工具，使用Anthropic旗下编程助手服务时，需要支付额外费用，相关用户使用该项服务的成本将因此有所上涨。
articles.summary_original: It’s about to become more expensive for Claude Code subscribers to use Anthropic’s coding assistant with OpenClaw and other third-party tools.

articles.title: 尖锐新闻竞猜：辞职、可穿戴设备、食品
articles.title_original: Pointed News Quiz | Resignations, Wearable, Food
articles.summary: 彭博周末节目推出新闻竞猜环节，克里斯蒂娜·拉菲尼、乔·马修、莉萨·马特奥参与该环节互动。参与者可押注积分、灵活调整投注策略答题，彭博官网每周更新一期全新竞猜内容，供公众参与体验。
articles.summary_original: Christina Ruffini, Joe Mathieu and Lisa Mateo play Pointed on “Bloomberg This Weekend”! Wager your points, leverage your bets and answer wisely. A new quiz is available to play each week on Bloomberg.com (Source: Bloomberg)

articles.title: 北约秘书长吕特下周将会见特朗普
articles.title_original: NATO's Rutte to Meet With Trump Next Week
articles.summary: 彭博社周末节目邀请前美国驻北约大使伊沃·达尔德做客，围绕北约秘书长马克·吕特即将会见美国总统特朗普一事展开讨论。此次会面发生在特朗普最新发出美国退出北约的威胁之后，相关信息来自彭博社。
articles.summary_original: Former US Ambassador to NATO Ivo Daalder joins Christina Ruffini and Joe Mathieu on Bloomberg This Weekend to discuss NATO Secretary General Mark Rutte's upcoming visit with US President Trump following his latest threats to withdraw the US from the organization. (Source: Bloomberg)

articles.title: 阿尔忒弥斯二号登月行程过半
articles.title_original: Artemis II Passes Halfway Point to Moon
articles.summary: 彭博社消息称，彭博科技的埃德·拉德洛做客《彭博周末》节目，与克里斯蒂娜·鲁菲尼、乔·马修一同，就阿尔忒弥斯二号这项历史性登月任务的最新进展展开讨论，目前该任务已完成登月行程过半。
articles.summary_original: Bloomberg Tech's Ed Ludlow joins Christina Ruffini and Joe Mathieu on Bloomberg This Weekend to discuss Artemis II's progress on their historic mission to the moon. (Source: Bloomberg)

articles.title: 全球氦气短缺威胁科技领域
articles.title_original: Global Helium Shortage Threatens Tech Sectors
articles.summary: 卡塔尔关停全球最大液化天然气设施，扰乱全球氦气供应，对医疗应用、半导体制造以及国防科技领域构成威胁。中东持续冲突给氦气行业带来的下游影响，将由Pulsar Helium总裁克利夫·凯恩在彭博社周末节目中解读，消息来源为彭博社。
articles.summary_original: Qatar shutting down the world's largest liquefied natural gas facility has disrupted the global helium supply, threatening medical applications, semiconductor manufacturing, and national defense technology. Pulsar Helium President Cliff Cain joins Christina Ruffini and Joe Mathieu on Bloomberg This Weekend to explain the downstream effects the prolonged conflict in the Middle East is having on the industry. (Source: Bloomberg)

articles.title: 特朗普警告伊朗：还剩48小时 - 京报网
articles.summary: 美国总统特朗普对伊朗发出最后通牒，此前他已给伊朗10天期限，要求伊朗要么达成相关协议，要么开放霍尔木兹海峡，称若伊朗未满足美方要求，48小时内美国将对伊朗发动进一步袭击，有观点认为特朗普言论升级，或意在延长对伊相关行动。

articles.title: 塔吉特购买两款任天堂Switch游戏立减30美元
articles.title_original: Buy two Nintendo Switch games, get $30 off at Target
articles.summary: 零售平台塔吉特面向部分Target Circle会员推出优惠，购买两款任天堂Switch及Switch 2游戏可立减30美元。本次优惠活动截止至美国东部时间4月5日凌晨2:59，用户注册免费会员即可参与享受优惠。
articles.summary_original: Target is offering a great deal to some Target Circle members that knocks $30 off the cost of two Nintendo Switch and Switch 2 games. The sale is happening for the rest of the day, expiring at 2:59AM ET on April 5th. If you sign in with the free-to-join membership, you might be able to […]

articles.title: 关于被伊朗击落的F-15E“攻击鹰”战机的已知信息
articles.title_original: What We Know About the F-15E Strike Eagle Shot Down by Iran
articles.summary: 周五有官员对外披露两起美军军机事件，一架F-15E“攻击鹰”战机在伊朗上空被击落，另有一架A-10“疣猪”战机在霍尔木兹海峡附近坠毁。目前已有两名机上飞行人员获救，仍有一人下落不明。
articles.summary_original: An F-15E Strike Eagle was shot down over Iran and an A-10 Warthog crashed near the Strait of Hormuz, officials said on Friday. Two airmen were rescued, and one is unaccounted for.

articles.title: 我理想中的AR游戏眼镜需具备这九项特性
articles.title_original: My dream pair of AR gaming glasses needs to have these nine features
articles.summary: 作者耗时数月测试Xreal与Viture推出的最新AR眼镜，并非传统实验室测试，实际是每晚窝在沙发上，搭配Steam Deck或任天堂Switch 2，在只有自己可见的巨型虚拟屏幕上玩游戏，基于测试体验提出了理想AR游戏眼镜的九项必备特性。
articles.summary_original: I’ve spent months in the lab testing the latest AR glasses from Xreal and Viture. By “lab,” I mean cozied up on my couch each night, playing my Steam Deck or Nintendo Switch 2 on a huge, virtual screen that only I can see through these glasses. Using AR glasses as a portable display for […]

articles.title: 对抗恶意软件数十年，这名网安老将如今研究无人机黑客技术
articles.title_original: After fighting malware for decades, this cybersecurity veteran is now hacking drones
articles.summary: 米科·海普宁是全球网络安全领域最知名的人物之一，已对抗电脑病毒、蠕虫及各类恶意软件超过35年，近日他接受TechCrunch采访，阐述了自己转而研发阻遏杀伤性无人机系统的原因。
articles.summary_original: Mikko Hyppönen is one of the most recognizable faces of the cybersecurity industry. After fighting computer viruses, worms, and malware, for more than 35 years, he tells TechCrunch why he is now working on systems to stop killer drones.

articles.title: 真不是AI创作？拿出证据
articles.title_original: Really, you made this without AI? Prove it
articles.summary: 一名同时涉猎插画创作、业余摄影的作家表示，自己最怕听到“这看起来像AI做的”这类评价。当下生成式AI愈发擅长模仿人类创作，而不少线上平台拒绝对AI内容标注，这进一步引发了大众对创作来源的质疑。
articles.summary_original: "This looks like AI." It's a phrase I dread seeing as a writer who dabbles in illustration and amateur photography. In a world where generative AI technology is increasingly adept at mimicking the work of humans, people are naturally skeptical when online platforms refuse to label even obvious AI content. This leads me to one […]

articles.title: 创作真没靠AI？请拿出证据

articles.title: 家国永念｜山河铭记！总书记缅怀的那些英烈 - 中国网新闻中心
articles.summary: 英烈为家国民族作出不可磨灭的贡献，其精神永远被山河铭记。中国网新闻中心推出主题报道《家国永念｜山河铭记！总书记缅怀的那些英烈》，聚焦总书记缅怀过的英烈，传承弘扬英烈精神，完整报道可前往Google新闻查看。

articles.title: 复活节糖果销量下滑
articles.title_original: Easter Candy Sales Decline
articles.summary: 彭博情报最新报告显示，今年复活节糖果销量下滑5%，下滑主要由巧克力购买量减少推动。彭博股票研究分析师戴安娜·罗塞罗-佩纳将做客《彭博周末》节目，与克里斯蒂娜·鲁菲尼共同探讨相关议题，消息来源为彭博社。
articles.summary_original: Easter candy sales experienced a 5% decline this year, primarily driven by reduced chocolate purchases according to a new Bloomberg Intelligence report. Bloomberg's Equity Research Analyst Diana Rosero-Pena joins Christina Ruffini on Bloomberg This Weekend to discuss. (Source: Bloomberg)

articles.title: 《超级肉肉哥3D》让受苦变乐趣
articles.title_original: Super Meat Boy 3D makes suffering fun
articles.summary: 作为史上最知名的独立游戏之一，《超级肉肉哥》原作于2010年推出，是一款超高难度的2D平台跳跃游戏。其关卡短小接近速通谜题，虽遍布陷阱电锯，但近乎即时复活的设定让死亡无过重负担，游玩趣味十足，新作3D版延续了这一特点。
articles.summary_original: The original Super Meat Boy is one of the best-known indie games of all time. Released in 2010, it's a brutally difficult 2D platformer, but so fun to play: The short levels almost feel like speedrunning puzzles, and even though they're filled with traps and buzzsaws, dying isn't so bad because you revive nearly instantly. […]

articles.title: 涉谋杀遭通缉的逃亡黑手党头目于阿玛菲海岸豪华别墅落网
articles.title_original: Fugitive mafia boss wanted for murder arrested in Amalfi Coast luxury villa
articles.summary: 警方称，涉谋杀遭通缉的黑手党头目罗伯托·马扎雷拉已落网，这名头目已逃亡超过一年，落网前一直使用假名藏匿于阿玛菲海岸的一处豪华别墅中。
articles.summary_original: Roberto Mazzarella has been on the run for more than a year and was living under a false name, police say.

articles.title: 战争期间伊朗人在自然中寻求喘息
articles.title_original: Iranians Seek Respite in Nature Amid the War
articles.summary: 当前伊朗身处战事之中，该国新年假期步入尾声之际，不少伊朗民众携家人前往户外，聚集野餐、开展游戏，抓住这短暂的间隙庆祝节日，在自然中暂离战事阴影，获得片刻喘息放松。
articles.summary_original: Families gathered for picnics and games this week to mark the end of the Iranian new year holiday, seizing on a brief chance to celebrate.

articles.title: 欧洲在霍尔木兹海峡的选择：选项寥寥，风险重重
articles.title_original: Europe’s Options in the Strait of Hormuz: Few, and Risky
articles.summary: 伊朗战争结束后，欧洲领导人及其他官员提出了恢复霍尔木兹海峡航运的相关构想，但目前没有任何一项方案能够稳操胜券，欧洲在该问题上可选的有效方案不多，且所有选项都存在较高风险。
articles.summary_original: European leaders and other officials have ideas for bringing shipping back to the strait once the Iran war ends. But none of them are sure bets.

articles.title: 安克星云P1投影仪：便携投影音质之王
articles.title_original: Anker’s Nebula P1 projector is the portable sound king
articles.summary: 在便携谷歌电视投影测评中，安克旗下声阔星云P1既不是最便携的产品，亮度也不突出，甚至没有内置电池。这款表现尚可的视频设备主打音质，突出特点是配有一对可分离扬声器，可实现纯正左右声道输出。
articles.summary_original: The Soundcore Nebula P1 from Anker isn't the most portable Google TV projector I've ever reviewed, nor is it the brightest. It doesn't even have a built-in battery. Instead it's a decent video device that focuses on sound. The Nebula P1's standout feature is a pair of speakers that detach to create true left- and […]

articles.title: 阿尔忒弥斯二号机组赴月过半程 拍摄惊艳地球照片
articles.title_original: Artemis II crew now halfway to Moon as they take 'spectacular' image of Earth
articles.summary: 阿尔忒弥斯二号任务的机组人员正奔赴月球，目前已经走完了一半的行程。这张被形容为"惊艳绝伦"的地球照片，由本次任务的指挥官里德·怀斯曼在猎户座飞船舱内拍摄完成。
articles.summary_original: The snap was taken aboard the Orion capsule by its commander, Reid Wiseman, as the crew head towards the Moon.

articles.title: 一群00后极客和这家机器人公司共处72小时
articles.summary: 全球首届具身智能开发者大会在深圳举办，20组以00后为主的开发者，在主办方提供的充沛算力、高性能机械臂支持下，用72小时攻关，让机械臂完成真实场景任务。赛事设A/B榜考验模型泛化性，主办方希望推动具身智能落地平权，共建开放行业生态。

articles.title: 爱泼斯坦向印度大亨自称是特朗普白宫内部人士
articles.title_original: Epstein Presented Himself to Indian Tycoon as a Trump White House Insider
articles.summary: 已被定罪的性犯罪者爱泼斯坦曾向印度大亨安尼尔·安巴尼提供美国人事任命与外交政策相关信息，部分信息事后看来颇具先见之明，但目前没有证据证明他与特朗普政府关系密切。
articles.summary_original: The convicted sex offender gave Anil Ambani information on appointments and foreign policy. Some seemed prescient, though there was no evidence he was close to the administration.

articles.title: Anthropic走红私募市场 SpaceX或将打乱格局
articles.title_original: Anthropic is having a moment in the private markets; SpaceX could spoil the party
articles.summary: Rainmaker Securities总裁格伦·安德森表示，当前私募股份二级市场活跃度创下历史新高，Anthropic是目前最热门的交易标的，OpenAI热度有所下滑，而SpaceX即将启动的IPO有望重塑整个市场格局。
articles.summary_original: Glen Anderson, president of Rainmaker Securities, says the secondary market for private shares has never been more active — with Anthropic the hottest trade around, OpenAI losing ground, and SpaceX's looming IPO poised to reshape the landscape for everyone.

articles.title: Lucid将一季度销量下滑归咎于座椅供应商问题
articles.title_original: Lucid blames dip in Q1 sales on seat supplier issue
articles.summary: 电动汽车企业Lucid披露其一季度销量下滑，原因出自座椅供应商相关问题。目前该公司已经解决了这一问题，同时明确表示不会调整此前发布的2026年业绩指引，整体发展规划保持不变。
articles.summary_original: Lucid said it has resolved the problem and is not changing its guidance for 2026.

articles.title: Anthropic要求订阅者额外付费 实质上禁止OpenClaw接入Claude
articles.title_original: Anthropic essentially bans OpenClaw from Claude by making subscribers pay extra
articles.summary: Anthropic本周五晚间向用户发送邮件宣布政策调整，自美国东部时间4月4日下午3点起，用户无法再用现有Claude订阅额度使用包括OpenClaw在内的第三方对接工具，继续使用需支付额外费用，此举实质上封禁了OpenClaw的免费接入权限。

Instead, if users […]
